copied_from.display_value: Requester cannot see Cancel button on new form

sys_atf_test.description: The cancel button does not appear to the requester if a new form has not been submited yet.
sys_atf_test.name: Requester cannot see Cancel button on new form copy
sys_atf_test.sys_name: Requester cannot see Cancel button on new form copy
